case_title: PATEL, RAMESH P. vs. SHOTZ, LOUIS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION GIVING PROPERTY MANAGER AUTHORITY TO SUE ON OWNERS BEHALF FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH P.
